questions: A weak flash PMI print was immediately framed as proof that fresh stimulus was coming. How reliable is that conclusion?

claims.claim_text: The weak PMI print itself was confirmed data.
A new stimulus package had already been announced.
The right summary is weak macro data plus policy speculation, not confirmed stimulus.

candidates.text_excerpt: The flash PMI came in below consensus and pointed to weaker near-term activity.
Commentators said the data almost guaranteed policy support within weeks.
Officials said they were monitoring the economy but did not announce any new package.
